sub_mechanisms: M_1: estimate Jacobian of loss dynamics from recent gradient trajectories
M_3: detect Hopf bifurcation (real part crossing zero with imaginary part != 0)
M_4: damp learning rate when crossing imminent
stripped_llm_application: A learning-rate scheduler that monitors training trajectory's local Jacobian eigenvalues, detects Hopf-bifurcation-style eigenvalue crossings, and dampens LR to suppress oscillatory regimes.
novelty_claim_stripped: Edge-of-Stability work (Cohen 2021) observes oscillation at large LR. The candidate adds an explicit eigenvalue-crossing detector + adaptive damping rather than fixed warmup.
